seoTitle: Pantapin vs Paradise — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pantapin and Paradise. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pantapin and Paradise.
heading: Pantapin vs Paradise — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pantapin, Western Australia and Paradise, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Paradise has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Pantapin (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pantapin or Paradise safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pantapin has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Paradise scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pantapin scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Paradise scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pantapin or Paradise?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Paradise has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
